subcodes.first_line: The Ancient Lights course through the mighty Throne, and sacred mysteries are inscribed upon the perfumed Tablets, and the Dove of Power [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انوار قدیم در عرش عظیم سایر و اسرار قویم بر الواح شمیم ساطر و حمامه قدرت در
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @mystical themes, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @transcendence; unknowability of God, @symbolism
